mapper.select: SELECT tag_name FROM user_tag WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY tag_name COLLATE NOCASE
mapper.insert: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO user_tag (id, owner_id, tag_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{ownerId}, #{tagName})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_tag WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND tag_name = #{tagName}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_tag WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND tag_name = #{tagName}
